data.name: Hentai Clicker: Eva is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Eva is streaming

Step into the seductive ward of Eva, your voluptuous brunette nurse with smooth hair tied in a bun, sultry eyes, and curves that could stop a heartbeat. Every click makes her breathe heavier, her blush deeper, and her uniform tighter.
She’s here to take your temperature… but she might raise it instead. 💉💋

🩺 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Eva is streaming combines addictive clicker gameplay with the thrill of a forbidden nurse fantasy.
Each tap brings you closer to Eva’s steamy secrets—collect hearts to unlock seductive uniforms, naughty animations, and voice lines that grow hotter with every level.

As your skills improve, Eva’s reactions become more intense—her moans softer, her teasing bolder, her “treatments” more extreme.
Can you handle the full dose of her attention? ❤️‍🔥

🔞 NSFW Content

From gentle examinations and cheeky teasing to full-on medical play, this game features uncensored adult scenes packed with heat, lust, and plenty of bedside passion.

🎉 Features

💉 Seductive Nurse Fantasy – Eva, the curvy brunette who knows how to make your heart race.
🎨 High-Quality Anime Art – Detailed, sensual visuals that bring every steamy scene to life.
🖱️ Clicker Gameplay – Simple, fun, and dangerously addictive.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From a classic nurse uniform to scandalous latex lingerie.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – She reacts to your every click with gasps, whispers, and playful moans.
🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Boost your heart gain and unlock hotter, wilder stages.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you’ve ever fantasized about a nurse who blurs the line between care and temptation, Eva is your perfect cure.
She’s professional by day, sinful by night—and she’ll make sure your “check-up” ends with a pulse off the charts. 😈

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Each tap brings you closer to her next surprise.
🔓 Unlock Scenes – Use hearts to reveal new poses, outfits, and naughty interactions.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Make every click hotter, faster, and more rewarding.

🎉 Time for Your Naughty Check-Up!

Put on your gown and surrender to Hentai Clicker: Eva is streaming.
Nurse Eva is on call… and your pleasure is her top priority. 💋💉

data.short_description: 🔞 Let Nurse Eva take care of you in Hentai Clicker: Eva is streaming! 💉 Click to collect ❤️, unlock sexy nurse outfits, and enjoy explicit scenes with your irresistible brunette caregiver! 💋🔥
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
